section.p: The DRIFT app shell is installed. Build the PWA with npm run build:odoo to publish the React interface at /app/today.

a.style: position: fixed; right: 18px; bottom: 18px; z-index: 1040; min-height: 42px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0 16px; color: #050505 !important; background: #f4efe2; border: 1px solid rgba(5, 5, 5, 0.12); border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: 0 18px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22); font: 800 12px/1.1 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; letter-spacing: .12em; text-decoration: none !important; text-transform: uppercase;
